title: Upload file element not responding
symptom: The Upload file element does not allow file selection when clicked, and no action occurs. This issue persists in preview mode.
applies_when: In preview mode of the editor
not_this_if: The issue is resolved after clearing the browser cache
root_cause: The Upload file element may become unresponsive due to browser-related issues, such as cached data or temporary glitches that affect its functionality.
fix_steps: Try using the Upload file element again
agent_instruction: Clear your browser cache and restart the browser to resolve the issue with the Upload file element.
